mapper.update: MERGE INTO PROGRESS P USING DUAL ON (P.USER_NUM = #{userNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND P.LSN_NUM = #{lsnNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET P.PRG_COMPLETE = 'Y', P.PRG_LASTDATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PRG_NUM, USER_NUM, LSN_NUM, CLA_NUM, PRG_COMPLETE, PRG_LASTDATE) VALUES (SEQ_PROGRESS.NEXTVAL, #{userNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lsnNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{claNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', SYSDATE)

MERGE INTO PROGRESS P USING DUAL ON (P.USER_NUM = #{userNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND P.LSN_NUM = #{lsnNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET P.PRG_LASTDATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PRG_NUM, USER_NUM, LSN_NUM, CLA_NUM, PRG_COMPLETE, PRG_LASTDATE) VALUES (SEQ_PROGRESS.NEXTVAL, #{userNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lsnNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{claNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N', SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT PRG_NUM as prgNum, USER_NUM as userNum, LSN_NUM as lsnNum, CLA_NUM as claNum, PRG_COMPLETE as prgComplete, PRG_LASTDATE as prgLastdate FROM PROGRESS WHERE USER_NUM = #{userNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND LSN_NUM = #{lsnNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT CASE WHEN total_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((completed_cnt / total_cnt) * 100, 1) END as progress FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LESSON WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as total_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROGRESS WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USER_NUM = #{userNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PRG_COMPLETE = 'Y') as completed_cnt FROM DUAL )

SELECT PRG_NUM as prgNum, USER_NUM as userNum, LSN_NUM as lsnNum, CLA_NUM as claNum, PRG_COMPLETE as prgComplete, PRG_LASTDATE as prgLastdate FROM PROGRESS WHERE USER_NUM = #{userNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CLA_NUM = #{claNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
